title: Item
description: Foldkit-native shadcn base-nova Item structural helpers with Schema-backed variant, size, and media metadata plus local class maps.
markdown:
# Item

## Overview

Item is a styled structural helper for arranging media, title, description, and actions in a compact content row. It preserves the shadcn base-nova slot and class contract while replacing the origin React, CVA, and render-prop assumptions with Foldkit Html helpers.

## Foldkit Model

Item is stateless. It does not own a Model, Message, update function, or Command. Parent views pass Foldkit Html children and parent-owned event attributes into the relevant slots.

## Usage

Bind `const h = html<Message>()` in the parent view, then compose Item parts with parent messages for actions.

```ts
Item({
  variant: 'outline',
  children: [
    ItemContent({
      children: [
        ItemTitle({ children: ['Project synced'] }),
        ItemDescription({ children: ['Your local copy is current.'] }),
      ],
    }),
  ],
})
```

Use `toView` when the Item root needs to render as an anchor or another named element.

## Examples

The registry includes examples for the origin demo, avatar, dropdown trigger, group, header image grid, icon media, image media, link, RTL, size, and variant previews.

Icon examples use local inline SVGs instead of `lucide-react`. Image examples use plain image elements instead of `next/image`.

## Accessibility

Use `ItemGroup` for related lists so the group receives `role="list"`. When an Item is rendered as a link, provide the same navigation attributes you would provide to a normal anchor. Icon-only Button actions should have accessible labels.

## Foldkit Differences

The origin implementation depends on React, Base UI React render helpers, and `class-variance-authority`. This registry item replaces those with Foldkit Html, `toView` composition, Effect Schema literals, and pure local class maps.

registry.reason: Item avatar, group, and dropdown examples compose the local shadcn Avatar registry item.
Item action and dropdown trigger examples compose the local shadcn Button registry item.
Origin dropdown example is represented against the local shadcn Dropdown Menu parity surface.
ItemSeparator composes the local shadcn Separator registry item while preserving the origin item-specific slot.
shadcn Item uses local class canonicalization and Tailwind conflict handling.

runtime.reason: Provides Html, Attribute, and html factory APIs for the Foldkit-native helpers.
Provides Effect Schema literals for Item variant, size, and media metadata.
Provided through the local utils/cn registry dependency.
Provided through the local utils/cn registry dependency.

development.reason: Origin React prop merging is replaced by Foldkit attribute composition.
Origin render support is represented by Foldkit toView composition.
Origin CVA usage is replaced by Effect Schema literals and pure local class maps.
Origin icon examples are represented by local inline SVGs in this batch.
Origin image examples are represented by plain image shims in this batch.
Origin RTL example dependency is replaced by local Arabic example constants and origin fixture aliases.
React is origin fixture evidence only, not installable Foldkit source.

examples.title: ItemDemo
examples.description: Basic Item and render-as-anchor verified Item examples.

examples.title: ItemAvatar
examples.description: Item examples that compose local Avatar and Button helpers.

examples.title: ItemDropdown
examples.description: Closed dropdown trigger example matching the origin Item dropdown preview root.

examples.title: ItemGroupExample
examples.description: Grouped people list using ItemGroup, ItemMedia, ItemContent, and ItemActions.

examples.title: ItemHeaderDemo
examples.description: Card-like Item grid with image headers.

examples.title: ItemIcon
examples.description: Icon media Item with an action Button.

examples.title: ItemImage
examples.description: Linked music list Items with image media and secondary content.

examples.title: ItemLink
examples.description: Item rendered as internal and external anchors through toView.

examples.title: ItemRtl
examples.description: RTL Item example using local Arabic strings instead of the origin language selector.

examples.title: ItemSizeDemo
examples.description: Default, small, and extra-small Item size examples.

examples.title: ItemVariant
examples.description: Default, outline, and muted Item variant examples.

deviations.summary: Icon examples use local inline SVGs instead of origin icon packages.
deviations.rationale: Installable source cannot depend on lucide-react. Local SVGs preserve the inline icon DOM role and visual footprint for Item examples without adding icon registry items.

deviations.summary: Image examples use plain image shims instead of next/image.
deviations.rationale: Installable Foldkit source cannot depend on Next.js. Plain image elements preserve the rendered media footprint and class contract needed by Item examples.

deviations.summary: RTL example uses local Arabic constants instead of the origin language-selector runtime dependency.
deviations.rationale: Installable source cannot depend on the origin app language selector. Local Arabic example constants preserve the default RTL rendered output while fixture aliases keep the origin evidence bundleable.
